summary: Both round-1 findings are resolved. T2-C1: DEPLOYER_KEY placeholder replaced with a clearly non-functional sentinel with an explicit warning comment. T2-C2: foundry.lock role documented in foundry.toml header as a secondary lock complementing submodule SHA pinning. No new findings. Task 2 is approved.

T2-C1.notes: DEPLOYER_KEY now uses the non-functional sentinel 0x<your-0x-prefixed-64-hex-char-private-key> with an explicit warning comment that the all-zeros key is a publicly-known monitored address. Fix is correct and clear.

T2-C2.notes: foundry.toml header comment now documents foundry.lock as a forge 1.6+ secondary lock that complements submodule SHA pinning and is committed for reproducibility. The explanation is accurate and removes all ambiguity about its presence.
